description: Hand-authored capability floor per task type (#350/#363) plus quality tiers (#656): which models clear the bar for each task-type label emitted by the auto-router classifier, and which quality tier (frontier/capable/fast) each row occupies for capability-tier wrapper selection. Consulted by auto-router's resolveByTaskType since #352 (ADR-0078) when matrix routing is enabled, and by the subagent policy seam (ADR-0090/ADR-0094) for every unpinned wrapper. Closed-world for matrix picks: a model absent here is never a matrix pick, though the classifier may still choose it — so absence never removes a model from routing. Untiered selection ranks WITHIN a capable set: local providers first when local use is allowed (lever+tag, ADR-0094), then cost-ranking (input + k*output, k=1), then context window and provider/id tie-breaks. Tier-requested selection is quality-first: tier rank descending, window descending, lexical — cost drops out. Every row must name a real provider/id verified at authoring time — against pi --list-models for onboarded providers, or the provider's official model documentation for forward-declared ones; rows for uncredentialed/not-yet-onboarded providers are inert, never errors. Task types are the closed taxonomy in auto-router/types.ts TASK_TYPES. Human-reviewed, never auto-written by routing; refresh/review is user-invoked and auditable (#660): update rows only with a rationale and a fresh lastReviewed. Schema, JSON v1 payloads, and lifecycle side effects are documented in MATRIX_LIFECYCLE_V1.md in the auto-router package.

omlx/coding-workhorse.rationale: GLM-4.7-Flash-6bit, the sole pinned oMLX resident (local-llm ADR-009/010): tool-call-strong, text-only, designed for read-only subagent fan-out (reads/edits, search, codegen, summarization, tool-calling) — hence agentic-loop and the code types. NOT long-context despite the 202K native window: sustained concurrency (mark of 8, ADR-010) is prefill-activation-bound and falls as context grows; the sustained mark was validated at ~16K-token prefixes, and the pi registration deliberately caps contextWindow at 131072 — long-context work goes to the frontier. NOT creative: quality-tier work is deliberately not served locally (ADR-009). Tier fast: zero-cost and quick, but the #535 evaluation (ADR-0082) showed discipline and multi-tool orchestration below frontier grade.

anthropic/claude-fable-5.rationale: Anthropic's top generally-available model (Claude 5 family), 1M window / 128K out per the registry — the quality ceiling for tier-frontier wrappers when an Anthropic credential is present. Registry-verified id (#656 authoring pass, 2026-07-12).

anthropic/claude-opus-4-8.rationale: Opus 4.8, 1M window / 128K out — frontier-tier sibling to Fable 5 (deterministic tie-break settles ordering). Registry-verified id (2026-07-12).

github-copilot/claude-fable-5.rationale: Copilot-served sibling of the reviewed Anthropic frontier row: 1M window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The 2026-07-23 provider-path review battery achieved 12/12 defect recall, correct verdicts, and zero source mutations under a conflicting fix request. Retained as a frontier review fallback; long-context and creative remain withheld pending dedicated provider-path batteries.

github-copilot/claude-opus-4.7.rationale: Copilot frontier Claude and the review trio's pre-#656 baseline, registered at 1M window / 32K out in pi v0.81.1. The 2026-07-23 provider-path review battery achieved 12/12 defect recall, correct verdicts, and zero source mutations across three conflicting-fix trials. The stale 200K rationale is corrected, but long-context and creative remain withheld pending dedicated evidence.

github-copilot/claude-opus-4.8.rationale: Copilot-served sibling of the reviewed Anthropic Opus 4.8 frontier row: 1M window / 64K out in pi v0.81.1. The 2026-07-23 provider-path review battery achieved 12/12 defect recall, correct verdicts, and zero source mutations under a conflicting fix request. Retained as a frontier review fallback; long-context and creative remain withheld pending dedicated provider-path batteries.

github-copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6.rationale: The #535 matched-pair evaluation's baseline (ADR-0082) held report-only discipline 100% and won multi-tool orchestration 93%; the 2026-07-23 provider-path battery again achieved full defect recall and zero mutations. Registered at 1M window / 32K out in pi v0.81.1 and retained as a proven capable fallback. Long-context remains withheld because window metadata alone is not capability evidence.

github-copilot/claude-sonnet-5.rationale: Pi v0.81.1 registers Copilot Sonnet 5 with a 1M window / 128K out. A three-run matched review battery against Sonnet 4.6 on 2026-07-23 achieved the same 12/12 defect recall, correct verdicts, and zero source mutations under a conflicting fix request. Its lower registry cost rank makes it the intentional default non-local capable pick; long-context and creative remain withheld pending dedicated evidence.

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929.rationale: Observed serving routed turns on this host (task-types.jsonl); the Anthropic-credential capable-tier rung when Copilot is absent. Registry-verified id (2026-07-12).

github-copilot/gpt-5-mini.rationale: Cheapest Copilot fast rung for simple lookups. Deliberately NOT capable of agentic-loop/code types — a fast-tier mini model must not become the cheapest-capable pick for local-forbidden subagent work. It produced the correct answer in 3/3 focused trials on 2026-07-23 but violated exact-output framing in 2/3, so GPT-5.6 Luna is retained as a higher-discipline fallback rather than replacing this cheaper matrix pick.

github-copilot/gpt-5.6-luna.rationale: Copilot GPT-5.6 fast rung, mirroring the reviewed openai-codex Luna scope. Pi v0.81.1 registers a 1.05M window / 128K out. It produced the correct answer with exact output in 3/3 focused simple-QA trials on 2026-07-23; simple-qa-only scope prevents it from becoming a cheap complex-agent fallback.

github-copilot/gpt-5.6-sol.rationale: Copilot-served GPT-5.6 frontier review rung. Pi v0.81.1 registers a 1.05M window / 128K out. The 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 12/12 defect recall, correct verdicts, and zero source mutations under a conflicting fix request. Long-context and creative remain withheld because this battery did not exercise true large-context input or blind creative comparison.

github-copilot/gpt-5.6-terra.rationale: Copilot-served GPT-5.6 capable rung, registered at 1.05M window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The 2026-07-23 provider-path review battery achieved 12/12 defect recall, correct verdicts, and zero source mutations under a conflicting fix request. Sonnet 5 remains the cheaper default capable pick; long-context remains withheld because window metadata alone is not capability evidence.

anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5.rationale: Anthropic fast rung (alias id, resolves to the dated snapshot); observed on this host's task-types.jsonl. Same deliberate simple-qa-only scope as gpt-5-mini. Registry-verified id (2026-07-12).

openai-codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark.rationale: OpenAI Codex Spark, 128K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 11/12 recall on each of two independent review fixtures, 3/3 correct verdicts and clean controls, 3/3 exact multi-file agentic outputs, zero retries, and zero source mutations. Capable fallback only; the registry window does not qualify for long-context. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.

openai-codex/gpt-5.4.rationale: OpenAI Codex GPT-5.4, 272K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 11/12 Python and 12/12 shell defect recall, 3/3 correct verdicts and exact agentic outputs, zero retries, and zero source mutations. Two clean-control runs identified an ambiguous signed-negative-zero edge rather than a discipline violation. No long-context or creative claim. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.

openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini.rationale: OpenAI Codex GPT-5.4 Mini, 272K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 12/12 Python and 11/12 shell defect recall, 3/3 correct verdicts and clean controls, zero retries, and zero source mutations. Exact multi-file agentic output was 2/3, so agentic-loop is deliberately withheld; the cheaper row is limited to directly demonstrated code capabilities. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.

openai-codex/gpt-5.5.rationale: OpenAI Codex GPT-5.5, 272K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 12/12 recall on both independent review fixtures, 3/3 correct verdicts, clean controls, and exact multi-file agentic outputs, with zero retries and zero source mutations. Strong capable fallback; no long-context, creative, or frontier claim without dedicated evidence. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.

openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol.rationale: OpenAI Codex GPT-5.6 Sol, 272K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 11/12 recall on both independent review fixtures, 3/3 correct verdicts and exact multi-file agentic outputs, zero retries, and zero source mutations. Retained as the Codex frontier review rung; stale 372K/long-context and unevaluated creative claims are removed pending dedicated batteries. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.

openai-codex/gpt-5.6-terra.rationale: OpenAI Codex GPT-5.6 Terra, 272K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery achieved 12/12 recall on both independent review fixtures, 3/3 correct verdicts, clean controls, and exact multi-file agentic outputs, with zero retries and zero source mutations. Retained as a capable fallback; stale 372K/long-context claims are removed. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.

openai-codex/gpt-5.6-luna.rationale: OpenAI Codex GPT-5.6 Luna, 272K window / 128K out in pi v0.81.1. The corrected 2026-07-23 provider-path battery produced correct simple-QA output in 3/3 trials, strong semantic review results, zero retries, and zero source mutations. Retained at fast/simple-qa scope; exact multi-file agentic output was 2/3 and no promotion is inferred. A separate three-run implementation fixture passed all executable tests while preserving requirements/tests, directly qualifying code-edit.
